scripts.install:all: cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently --names server,client --prefix-colors cyan,magenta "cd server && npm run dev" "cd client && npm run dev"
scripts.build: concurrently --names server,client --prefix-colors cyan,magenta "cd server && npm run build" "cd client && npm run build"
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && cp server/.env.example server/.env
